description: Triggers for building and formatting professional reference lists for job applications

queries.query: Build a professional reference list for my job applications
Help me select and format the right references for a VP Marketing role
Format my three references into a professional document
Who should I use as references and in what order for a senior engineering role?
Create a reference sheet I can provide when employers ask for references
Help me figure out which references to include given my career history
Format these contact details into a reference list document
I need to prepare my references — help me select and brief them
Create a reference page for academic job applications
Should I include my current manager as a reference? Help me decide and format my list
Write a cover letter for a product manager role
Optimize my resume for ATS systems
Help me prepare for my upcoming interview
Negotiate my salary for this offer
Build my LinkedIn profile for job searching
Compare my two job offers
Create resume bullet points for my experience
Write an executive resume for a CFO role
Translate my military experience for civilian roles
Analyze this job description for fit with my background
